$comment: Controlled vocabulary for the `project_tags` field. Adopters declare their own literal project handles in their workspace config (`.skill-graph/config.json`); only `skill-graph` (this repo) is shipped as a literal handle. Semantic tags below are illustrative categories cross-project tags commonly fall into — extend with your own. Scope: soft-advisory — skill-lint.js emits WARNING (not error) for unknown tags.
